params.name: Golden Toad Tripod
params.description: The three-legged Golden Toad is a creature that can spit out treasures. It serves the Queen Mother of the West and has the ability to absorb the essence of moonlight to increase the success rate of refining divine elixirs. The elixir of immortality that Chang'e stole was refined by it...
